meta.title: Cookie Policy — vngoweb
meta.description: vngoweb's policy on cookies and browser storage: the types of data used, their purposes and how you can control them.

title: Cookie Policy
intro: vngoweb uses cookies and similar storage technologies (localStorage, sessionStorage) to operate the service. This page explains how they are used.

sections.heading: 1. What cookies are
paragraphs: Cookies are small data files stored in your browser when you visit a website. vngoweb also uses similar browser storage technologies (localStorage) to remember your login session between visits.

sections.heading: 2. Types of storage vngoweb uses
list: Essential — stores your login token to keep you signed in between visits; required to use the Dashboard and Template Editor.
Analytics — an anonymous session ID attached to each visit to a public website, used to measure views/interactions. This ID is never used to track individuals across other websites or services.
Preferences — remembers the display language you choose on the platform and on public websites.

sections.heading: 3. What vngoweb does not use
paragraphs: vngoweb does not use advertising cookies or third-party cross-site trackers (no Google Ads, Facebook Pixel or similar advertising platforms).

sections.heading: 4. Controlling cookies
paragraphs: You can delete or block cookies/stored data in your browser settings at any time. Please note: blocking or deleting essential data will sign you out of your account, and some platform features may stop working until you sign in again.

sections.heading: 5. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: vngoweb may update this policy when new features involving browser storage are added. The latest version will always be published on this page.
